data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm the implementation of this billing method. The linked use case mentions the need for milestone-based billing but does not provide concrete evidence of its functionality or validation, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement. Specifically, there are no details on how the system tracks milestones or calculates billing based on completion percentages.
gaps: Milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing) is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for milestone-based billing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the milestone-based billing functionality.
